subject: fix(api+mobile): Vercel rewrites for tool-till-tees + min-h-dvh on Loading
body:
The deployed app at sun-sea-o.vercel.app was 404'ing every /api/sancio/*
call because VITE_API_BASE_URL wasn't set in the build env, so requests
resolved to the same origin where no functions exist. Replace the
env-var dependency with same-origin Vercel rewrites that proxy
/api/sancio/* and /api/health to tool-till-tees, and mirror the same
mapping in vite.config.ts server.proxy so `npm run dev` matches.
VITE_API_BASE_URL stays as an optional override.

Loading fallbacks in App.tsx used min-h-screen (100vh), which on Android
Chrome with the address bar visible (804 vs 674px) pushes content below
the fold. Switch to min-h-dvh to match body and AuthLayout.

Tags: bugfix, deployment, mobile, api
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-mobile-viewport
